pins.name: PB5/RESET
pins.function: GPIO PB5 or active-low reset/debugWIRE input according to fuse configuration.

pins.name: PB3
pins.function: GPIO PB3 with ADC3 and crystal/clock input functions.

pins.name: PB4
pins.function: GPIO PB4 with ADC2 and crystal output functions.

pins.name: PB0
pins.function: GPIO PB0 with MOSI/DI/SDA and timer functions.

pins.name: PB1
pins.function: GPIO PB1 with MISO/DO and timer functions.

pins.name: PB2
pins.function: GPIO PB2 with SCK/USCK/SCL, ADC1, and INT0 functions.

ratings.name: supply voltage
ratings.qualifier: Operating range for up to 10 MHz; higher frequency has a higher minimum voltage.
ratings.locator: page 1, Operating Voltage and Speed Grade; electrical characteristics

ratings.name: CPU frequency
ratings.qualifier: Maximum speed grade at the required supply voltage.

ratings.name: flash memory
ratings.locator: page 1, Nonvolatile Program and Data Memories

orientation.description: Pin-one or terminal orientation is documented; tape-pocket rotation and assembly-machine convention are not qualified here.

notes: Confirm clock, reset, and debugWIRE fuse policy before production programming.
Place local supply decoupling at VCC and GND.

checks.name: official source identity
checks.method: Reviewed the official manufacturer document and recorded its revision, locators, retrieval state, and hash when byte capture succeeded.

checks.name: pin and package extraction
checks.method: Compared the package-specific pin map with the manufacturer pin table and package section.

checks.name: independent engineering review
checks.method: No second human review, specimen inspection, footprint fit, assembly trial, or electrical qualification belongs to this record yet.

known_issues.summary: Clock and reset fuse choices can remove the expected programming or reset path; the part can appear dead even when the PCB pinout is correct.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization based on the linked official manufacturer source.
